title: Cotton Tree Everday Essential Petroleum Jelly, 284G
features: CARE, MOISTURISE, LUBRICATE: Cotton Tree Petroleum Jelly is a popular lubricant that provides an effective barrier against moisture loss. It adds moisture to dry skin conditions including eczema and cares for delicate skin with nappy rash.
WINTER SKIN: Help protect skin from seasonal soreness by using Cotton Tree Petroleum Jelly to comfort and moisturise cracked or chapped lips and hands.
BARRIER TREATMENT: Popular for use in various sports including jogging and running as a barrier between the skin and clothing to prevent friction. Use as required.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pure petroleum jelly, 284g
